title: Verify trailer auto-plays in Engagement section for unstarted content
description: Test that if the content shown in the Engagement section has not been started, its trailer begins playing automatically.
preconditions: The content displayed in the Engagement section has not been started by the user
User is viewing the Trial Corner screen

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the Trial Corner screen

expected_result: The trailer for the displayed content starts playing automatically without user interaction.
